cooperates.cooperate_desc: Due to you turning yourself into the ultimate Beyblade ,you might be moving the enemy into unwanted places. Layla can help you deal the damage from far away as to make sure she survives and the enemy dies

counters.counter_desc: Akai is very weak against Nana's second abilty completely cancels out akai's ultimate which makes it so that Akai is now left too vulnerable and takes direct damage from all the enemies dps

dominants.dominant_desc: During early stages of the game you should do your best to help your gold lane farm. Akai is best at bursting down the enemy in early stages so take that opportunity to be as aggressive as you want. However be careful to not enter the enemy tower as you have no defense's for what's to come.

Make sure to roam and find opportunities where you can help your teammates lockdown an enemy or even better try to find enemies that walk too close to the tower and ult them into the line of sight of the tower and laugh as the enemy can't do anything but see their demise.
Make sure that you try to always go for the turtle or lord as Akai is the best and moving the enemies away from the objective. You can die if you must but make sure they can't take the objective.

You are the enabler for team fights. Find good opportunities to lockdown the enemies dps or control when a team fights occures so that your teammates can deal with the oncoming onslaught. If you are confident your teammates can handle the enemies dps and control then lockdown their tank as the tank can take enough damage from your teammates to ensure the enemies survival

emblems.emblem_desc: Inspire makes it so that your abilities will have a higher chance of being used during last second encounters. Pull yourself together helps flicker so that you'll have another chance of locking down an opponent. Concussive blast is to help with wave clearing and early damage.
emblems.emblem_title: Mistake? No worries! There's another chance~

equips.equip_desc:
- The encourage blessing is so that your team will be able to dish out more damage while you're beyblading their main dps. 

  -  Thunder belt is to ensure that Akai can keep scaling up his defense's on par to the enemies damage, and it helps with akai's damage dropping weakness.

  -  Twilight armor is so that you can survive any burst damage when you're focusing on controlling specific targets. This will help you against the current meta where burst dps is in high demand.

  -  Dominance of ice will depend on if the enemy has decent to high healing. If they focus more on dps than healing then you can change this with antique cuirass or Athena shield. (Blade armor or radiant armor for small continuous dps)

  -  Fleeting time makes it so that your ultimate will always be ready for the next Beyblade war you're entering.

  -  Immortality is not really needed here but it's a safe measure for when you die too early in the late game. You can switch this item to any of your choosing.
equips.equip_title: Hit me baby one more time!!!

hero.hero_overview: Do you want to keep moving around like nobodies business while whacking at the enemy and surviving to live the tale? Well akai's got your back! Keep chasing down an enemy or run away from that one doughnut that deals insanely amount of damage with his first ability. Keep whacking at people after sitting on them with your second ability and passive! Then if you hate someone then just be a Beyblade and lock them down in a corner with his ultimate!! With akai's arsenal of damage and mobility, he ensures that you'll have the last laugh even if you managed to die XD
hero.hero_strength: Very good short range mobility, high early damage output, can lockdown multiple enemies with his ultimate and good sustainability.amazing control for late game.
hero.hero_weakness: Damage drops in late game.requires a proper handling with his ultimate to ensure lockdown or dispersal.can't chase decent mobility heroes. Ultimate can still be affected by other crowd control affects. Missing the initial charge with the 1st ability will leave you in a bad situation

data.recommend: Play Akai and be on your way to mythic!

spell.spell_desc: Using flicker is very important with this hero as it enables you to have a bigger margin of error to use your ultimate. This also helps in chasing enemies.

data.title: Akai as the best supporter

hero.hero_strength: akai as jungle can rotate more around the map and can secure objectives. Also mlbb tournaments you will see high pick rate of akai as the jungle and not as the roam.

data.title: Damage akai

cooperates.cooperate_desc: It can easily burst the enemy if you pin the enemy with Akai's ultimate.
Good for keeping Akai's chance of survival. This team is good if you're using a jungle Akai.

counters.counter_desc: Counter for his potential set. It can also counter other heroes with sets like Khufra, Johnson, and Terizla. It can also be used for countering enemies with knock-up abilities.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Before Level 4 You Should Purchase Molten Essence First To Help Your Jungler Farm Efficiently And Gives Extra Damage To The Enemies. Before Turtle, You Should Rotate On Sidelines With Less Chance Of Surviving Or, In Simple Terms, The One That Is Always Getting Ganked To Prevent The Enemy Team From Getting Gold.

In Mid-Game Always Help Your Teammates. Disregard The Blame Of Your Teammates If You Failed To Protect Them, In This Way, You Can Focus More On Keeping The Balance Of The Game.

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set provides extra damages to help the jungle to farm efficiently and potential to dominate heroes that uses shield.

equips.equip_desc: This equipment helps to become more tanky and  prevents enemy from bursting akai. The key item in the early game is the molten essence, to provide magic defense and gives extra damage when engaging the enemies. The dominance serves to prevent enemies from healing and reducing their attack speed.

hero.hero_overview: Akai is a squishy/tank-type hero. It can survive a long-lasting battle but it can be easily bursted out. This guide can help you maximize Akai's ability to engage and possibly counterattack the enemies.
hero.hero_strength: This type of akai can handle multiple enemies at once when zoning enemies or saving teammates from close combat heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: It can chase enemies or engage with flicker but can't handle slow effects and long-ranged heroes.

spell.spell_desc: Used for ganking and chasing enemies. You can substitute it with Petrify or Sprint.

counters.counter_desc: Due to Argus abilities Akai won't be able to do lunch without his teamates but considering Akai is not that good in solo fights he has a lot of counters.

dominants.dominant_desc: Tips for using Akai are don't be scared to engage but be always aware of your surroundings and remember walls are your best friends so always use walls if possible
dominants.dominant_title: Before level 4 help the core by using 1 skill then head to Mid

emblems.emblem_desc: I choose this for the extra health I could get each kill and hero assist and Also since I am an aggressive akai user.

equips.equip_desc: This build is optional due to different outcomes that may come in fights but this is my basic recommendation dominance ice for cooldown and to counter heroes with vamp spell cursed helmet for survivability blade armor for Counter damage guardian helmet for extra heal for life and lastly immortality for second life

hero.hero_overview: Akai is a good early game pick especially for ganking and helping teammates but with a slight disadvantage late game due to high damage output of other heroes
hero.hero_strength: Akai is strong with his stuns that could help your teamates to attack the enemy easier especially with his Ultimate that could push the enemies through the wall.
hero.hero_weakness: His weaknesses are easily getting killed due to low defense in Late game.

spell.spell_desc: For battle spell it's best to use petrify for  better stun combo like 1st Petri 2nd and Ultimate depending on the situation.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Perfect mage with high damage burst, easy to delete enemies
Perfect gold laner with high damage, you have to crowd control for her.

counters.counter_desc: Taunt is annoying when you spin

dominants.dominant_desc: As an aggressive roamer, you have to force favorable team fights for your teammates. Early in the game, jungle, midlaner and exp have enough potential to secure kills with you on their side. Give vision of enemy jungle and try to invade jungle enemy with assistance of your midlaner and jungler if possible. If this fails, you can always gank mid or exp to poke and force them to return base to heal, even if you don't kill them, forcing them to leave their lanes will secure your teammates advantage

emblems.emblem_desc: Roaming and damage for early stage

equips.equip_desc: You do not necessarily need more damage, you have more than enough to take kills by yourself if enemies have bad positioning. However, later in the game you have to force favorable team fights for your teammates and you will need to absorb as much damage as possible for them to do the damage and take objectives.

hero.hero_overview: Akai can be either played as jungle or roaming. I like playing it as roaming to take advantage of his early game and potential to do big damage and support the other lanes get fed and snowball early on.
hero.hero_strength: Hero maing strength is setting up team fights early and mid game. You can either make big damage in the early levels and roam with your jungle to other lanes or gank other lanes yourself and force favorable team fights with your crowd control ultimate.
hero.hero_weakness: Hero start to fall off in the late game, he relies jungle and gold lane and you must play along with your teammates to secure kills and objectives.

data.recommend: Best roamer to climb to mythic playing solo Q

spell.spell_desc: Petrify secures positioning and CC. It allows your teammates to easily do damage to the enemy.
